mean_F0_Hz.name: Fundamental Frequency
mean_F0_Hz.interpretation: Values outside these ranges may indicate pitch disorders or endocrine issues.

std_dev_F0_Hz.name: Standard Deviation of F0
std_dev_F0_Hz.interpretation: Measures pitch variability. Should be very low (<6Hz) for sustained vowels, but higher for natural speech.

shimmer_local_db.name: Shimmer (Local, dB)
shimmer_local_db.interpretation: Amplitude instability. Values > 0.35 dB indicate breathiness.

hnr_mean_dB.name: Harmonics-to-Noise Ratio
hnr_mean_dB.interpretation: Higher is better. Values < 20 dB suggest significant noise (dysphonia) in the signal.

nhr_ratio.name: Noise-to-Harmonics Ratio
nhr_ratio.interpretation: Lower is better. Values > 0.19 suggest significant noise.

cpps_mean.name: Cepstral Peak Prominence Smoothed
cpps_mean.interpretation: Higher is better. Values < 14 dB (vowel) correlate strongly with dysphonia severity.
